slides.text:
You unravel me with a melody
You surround me with a song
Of deliverance from my enemies
Till all my fears rise up like dust
And in Your love I trust
slides.label: Verse 1

slides.text:
I'm no longer a slave to fear
I am a child of God
slides.label: Chorus

slides.text:
You split the sea so I could walk right through it
My fears were drowned in perfect love
You rescued me and I will stand and sing
I am a child of God
slides.label: Verse 2

slides.text:
You are my Abba Father
And so I'm no longer slave to fear
I am a child of God
slides.label: Bridge
